# Gardens Pool Service

> Family-owned weekly pool cleaning, chemistry balancing, and equipment service in Palm Beach Gardens, Jupiter, and North Palm Beach, FL. Same-day response. Call (561) 203-1900.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, service area, and same-day contact.
- [Pool Service Palm Beach Gardens](/pool-service-palm-beach-gardens/): Weekly cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment service details.
- [About](/about-gardens-pool-service/): Who we are — a family-owned local pool company.
- [Contact](/contact-gardens-pool-service/): Phone, service area, and hours.
